tasks.title: Worker: show clean error warning when Redis is unavailable
tasks.description: Update worker-entry.ts to detect Redis connection failure on startup and log a clear, human-readable error instead of crashing with an unhandled exception.

tasks.title: Migrate database from SQLite to PostgreSQL
tasks.description: Replace SQLite/LibSQL with PostgreSQL using postgres-js driver. Convert schema to pgTable with native timestamps, add Docker PG services, update env config, repos, services, types, tests, and Better Auth adapter. No data migration needed.

known_issues: drizzle-kit push may fail in vitest global-setup.ts — needs diagnosis (TASK-006)
